TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tang-ma-s.cye-bu-sun "kamu nu Ing, Thomas Jefferson, 1743 a mihca 4 a bulad 13 a demiad-1826 a mihca 7 a bulad 4 a demiad"saka tulu a Cong-tung nu Amilika "1801 a muhcaan -1809 a mihcaan". namahiza u "teked nu Amilika musakamu" angangan saayaway nu misulit a tademaw, atu Amilaka palekal tu kanatal u sakaliliday. Kalacungtungan u satabakiay a kawaw pasu ci Lu-i-s-an-na a picakay tu lala' "1803 a mihcaan", 1807 a mihcaan la'cus miculu'a hulican, atu aci Lu-i-s atu Ke-la-ke a piazih "1804- 1806 a mihcaan" uzip mala migingkiway tu cen-ce, ci Cye-bu-sun mitelung tu ku-tyen paydang ku nizateng atu kapulung a nizateng, nipahecekan "Wi-ci-ni-ya kiwkay paydang a hulic" "Virginia Statute for Religious Freedom, 1779,1786 ), uyni a hulic anuayaw mala nu Amilika a huluc tu sakacaca nisumadan nisabaluhayay angangan a nisulitan, Cye-bu-sun-min-cu, "Jeffersonian democracy" namahini a singangan ciniza. 1792 a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun patizeng a mikelid tu min-cu-kung-he-tang "ayzaay nu ayaway a min-cin-tang". "(Virginia Statute for Religious Freedom, 1779, 1786) . Cye-bu-sun na u saka tusa nu Wi-ci-niya-cow a cow-cang "1779 a mihcaan-1781 a mihcaan", saayaway nu Amilika a kow-u-cin "1789 a mihcaan-1793 a mihcaan", atu saka tusa nu Amilika a bu-Cong-tong "1797 a mihcaan-1801 a mihcaan. 1800 a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun pakazemec tu malaliday nu Amilika nu sakatulu a Cong-tong ci Ya-tang-s, namahiza nikilidan niza a cen-tang mikuwan tu Amilika katukuh sepat tu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan, katukuh cen-tanng niza tu 1824 a mihcaan katukuh i kaliwasakan. . Caay ku cen-ce dada; ku kawaw, ci Cyee-bu-sun mahiza sa u migingkiw tu kaluk, migingkiw tu palumaan, migingkiw tu sapatizeng, migingkiwa tu lalekalan tu cudad, migingkiw tu kasumamadan a tuud, migingkiw tu saasipan, migingkiw tu mi-ma, migingkiw tu sapidetek atu kasumamadan nu mauzipayay sye-ke a mitesekay, u mitesekay nu misulitay, mitesekay a binkusi atu adidic'ay a ti-cin, uyza aca nu Wi-ni-ci-ya talakaway cacudadan nu patizengay a tademaw. hini sa ku katuuday ciniza hatini mala Cong-tongay nu Amilika, u sitenengay. i 1962 a mihcaan cacay a pipalabangan 49 kunitakus tu tademaw nu sikawlahay tu Now-pey-al palabangan tu sandeb. Ye-han. Kan-nay-ti musuayay tu haminay nu tumunaw syaka nu sitinengay a tademaw musakamu, "pitapal aku ayza a sandebay kalacapu nu Pay-kung sakatuuday a tenengay atu sitinengay a tademawan-hakay miliyas tawyaay a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun tataytay itini mukan hawsa caay pisausi."I 2005 a mihcaan Amilika i wangle palekal tu pisingkiw a kawaw "u siicelangay amilika" ci Cye-bu-sun masingkiw tu saiicelangay nu Amilika tu 12 a tademaw. duduc ku katahkal hawsa u zu-lye-li ku hahizaen, 1743 a mihca 4 a bulad 2 a demiad Cye-bu-sun lecuh i Wi-ci-ni-ya a A-al-pow-ma-al cacay kitizaan cacay aenengan pangangan han Sa-te-wi-al a kalukan, nika kilul i mauzipay hawsa sumad au Ke-li-kaw-li-li, u pilecuhan ni Cye-bu-sun i 4 a bulad 13 a dimiad. ci Cye-bu-sun leccuh i kakitaan cumelakay ku luma', 10 ku calkakaan u sakatulu ciniza "tatusa ku mahaludutay" ngangan nu wama ci Pi-te. Cye-bu-sun, u palumaan pahabayay mikawa aca tu miditekay, wina ci Cen.lan-taw-bu "Jane Randolph", ci Ay-sya-mu.lan-taw-bu "Isham Randolph" atu ci Cen.low-cye-s "Jane Rogers" tataynaan a wawa, Pi-te. Cye-bu-sun "Peter Jefferson" u lalumaan. Ay-sye-mu ju iIng-kow-lin-tun-cen-tung-sa a Sa-te-wi-al tinsikiw a kiwkay "Shadwell Parish church" a malaacawa. Ci Tang-ma-s. Cye-bu-sun a babalaki u matenesay mueneng a Wi-ci-ni-ya nu mabulawan a luma'. (Isham Randolph)ŤąáÁŹć¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Jane Rogers)šĻčŚ•≥,ŚĹľŚĺó¬∑ŚāĎŚľóťĀú(Peter Jefferson) (Shadwell Parish church)ÁĶźÁöĄŚ©ö.śĻĮÁĎ™śĖĮ¬∑ . ci Pi-te.Cye-bu-sun matuduh ku luma' zikuz, hamin nu luma' mabulal tayza I Ye-ci-lin "Edge Hill". uyni a buyu i 17 lasubu a mihcaan hawsa miedap ci Ye-han.Li-pow-ney palahad tu cen-ce a kawaw a Ing-kow labu malalais saayaway a kalalais a singangan, .Cye-bu-sun a sabana Lu-si "Lucy" mikadabu ci Ca-al-s.Li-pow-ney.Lu-i-s "Charles Lilburne Lewis", cacay a tatamaan a wawapangangan han Li-pow-ney, u sabama ni Lan-taw-bu cacay a tatamaan a wawa pangangan han aca tu ci Li-pow-ney. (Charles Lilburne Lewis), . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinenngan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == taŇč-ma-s. ¶j…ô-bu-sun "kamu nu iŇč, tńßomas *…ôff…ôrson, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad"saka tur~…ĺu a ¶oŇč-tuŇč nu amir~…ĺika "**** a muńß ¶aan -**** a mińß ¶aan". namańßiza u "t…ôk…ôd nu amir~…ĺika musakamu" aŇčaŇčan saajawaj nu misur~…ĺit a tad…ômaw, atu amir~…ĺaka par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ u sakar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj. kar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇčan u satabakiaj a kawaw pasu ¶i r~…ĺu-i-s-an-na a pi ¶akaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "**** a mińß ¶aan", **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, atu a ¶i r~…ĺu-i-s atu k…ô-r~…ĺa-k…ô a piazińß "****- **** a mińß ¶aan" uzip mar~…ĺa migiŇčkiwaj tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun mit…ôr~…ĺuŇč tu ku-tj…ôn pajdaŇč ku nizat…ôŇč atu kapur~…ĺuŇč a nizat…ôŇč, nipańß…ô ¶…ôkan "wi- ¶i-ni-ja kiwkaj pajdaŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶" "*irginia statut…ô for *…ôr~…ĺigious fr…ô…ôdom, ****,**** ), ujni a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ anuajaw mar~…ĺa nu amir~…ĺika a ńßur~…ĺu ¶ tu saka ¶a ¶a nisumadan nisabar~…ĺuńßajaj aŇčaŇčan a nisur~…ĺitan, ¶j…ô-bu-sun-min- ¶u, "*…ôff…ôrsonian d…ômo ¶ra ¶j" namańßini a siŇčaŇčan ¶iniza. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun patiz…ôŇč a mik…ôr~…ĺid tu min- ¶u-kuŇč-ńß…ô-taŇč "ajzaaj nu ajawaj a min- ¶in-taŇč". "(*irginia statut…ô for *…ôr~…ĺigious fr…ô…ôdom, ****, ****) . ¶j…ô-bu-sun na u saka tusa nu wi- ¶i-nija- ¶ow a ¶ow- ¶aŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan", saajawaj nu amir~…ĺika a kow-u- ¶in "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan", atu saka tusa nu amir~…ĺika a bu- ¶oŇč-toŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun pakaz…ôm…ô ¶ tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu amir~…ĺika nu sakatur~…ĺu a ¶oŇč-toŇč ¶i ja-taŇč-s, namańßiza nikir~…ĺidan niza a ¶…ôn-taŇč mikuwan tu amir~…ĺika katukuńß s…ôpat tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, katukuńß ¶…ôn-tanŇč niza tu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i kar~…ĺiwasakan. . ¶aaj ku ¶…ôn- ¶…ô dada; ku kawaw, ¶i ¶j…ô…ô-bu-sun mańßiza sa u migiŇčkiw tu kar~…ĺuk, migiŇčkiw tu par~…ĺumaan, migiŇčkiw tu sapatiz…ôŇč, migiŇčkiwa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu ¶udad, migiŇčkiw tu kasumamadan a tuud, migiŇčkiw tu saasipan, migiŇčkiw tu mi-ma, migiŇčkiw tu sapid…ôt…ôk atu kasumamadan nu mauzipajaj sj…ô-k…ô a mit…ôs…ôkaj, u mit…ôs…ôkaj nu misur~…ĺitaj, mit…ôs…ôkaj a binkusi atu adidi ¶ Ē~ °aj a ti- ¶in, ujza a ¶a nu wi-ni- ¶i-ja tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadan nu patiz…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw. ńßini sa ku katuudaj ¶iniza ńßatini mar~…ĺa ¶oŇč-toŇčaj nu amir~…ĺika, u sit…ôn…ôŇčaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a pipar~…ĺabaŇčan ** kunitakus tu tad…ômaw nu sikawr~…ĺańßaj tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ par~…ĺabaŇčan tu sand…ôb. j…ô-ńßan. kan-naj-ti musuajaj tu ńßaminaj nu tumunaw sjaka nu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw musakamu, "pitapar~…ĺ aku ajza a sand…ôbaj kar~…ĺa ¶apu nu paj-kuŇč sakatuudaj a t…ôn…ôŇčaj atu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômawan-ńßakaj mir~…ĺijas tawjaaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun tatajtaj itini mukan ńßawsa ¶aaj pisausi."i **** a mińß ¶aan amir~…ĺika i waŇčr~…ĺ…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu pisiŇčkiw a kawaw "u sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj amir~…ĺika" ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun masiŇčkiw tu saii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu amir~…ĺika tu ** a tad…ômaw. dudu ¶ ku katańßkar~…ĺ ńßawsa u zu-r~…ĺj…ô-r~…ĺi ku ńßańßiza…ôn, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ¶j…ô-bu-sun r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i wi- ¶i-ni-ja a a-ar~…ĺ-pow-ma-ar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj kitizaan ¶a ¶aj a…ôn…ôŇčan paŇčaŇčan ńßan sa-t…ô-wi-ar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺukan, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i mauzipaj ńßawsa sumad au k…ô-r~…ĺi-kaw-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺi, u pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ¶j…ô-bu-sun i * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad. ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun r~…ĺ…ô ¶ ¶uńß i kakitaan ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ** ku ¶ar~…ĺkakaan u sakatur~…ĺu ¶iniza "tatusa ku mańßar~…ĺudutaj" ŇčaŇčan nu wama ¶i pi-t…ô. ¶j…ô-bu-sun, u par~…ĺumaan pańßabajaj mikawa a ¶a tu midit…ôkaj, wina ¶i ¶…ôn.r~…ĺan-taw-bu "*an…ô *andor~…ĺpńß", ¶i aj-sja-mu.r~…ĺan-taw-bu "isńßam *andor~…ĺpńß" atu ¶i ¶…ôn.r~…ĺow- ¶j…ô-s "*an…ô *og…ôrs" tatajnaan a wawa, pi-t…ô. ¶j…ô-bu-sun "p…ôt…ôr *…ôff…ôrson" u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan. aj-sj…ô-mu ju iiŇč-kow-r~…ĺin-tun- ¶…ôn-tuŇč-sa a sa-t…ô-wi-ar~…ĺ tinsikiw a kiwkaj "sńßadw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ parisńß ¶ńßur ¶ńß" a mar~…ĺaa ¶awa. ¶i taŇč-ma-s. ¶j…ô-bu-sun a babar~…ĺaki u mat…ôn…ôsaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a wi- ¶i-ni-ja nu mabur~…ĺawan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. (isńßam *andor~…ĺpńß)******(*an…ô *og…ôrs)**,******(p…ôt…ôr *…ôff…ôrson) (sńßadw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ parisńß ¶ńßur ¶ńß)***.**** . ¶i pi-t…ô. ¶j…ô-bu-sun matuduńß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, ńßamin nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mabur~…ĺar~…ĺ tajza i j…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺin "…ôdg…ô ńßir~…ĺr~…ĺ". ujni a buju i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa mi…ôdap ¶i j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô par~…ĺańßad tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawaw a iŇč-kow r~…ĺabu mar~…ĺar~…ĺais saajawaj a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais a siŇčaŇčan, . ¶j…ô-bu-sun a sabana r~…ĺu-si "r~…ĺu ¶j" mikadabu ¶i ¶a-ar~…ĺ-s.r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô.r~…ĺu-i-s " ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs r~…ĺir~…ĺburn…ô r~…ĺ…ôwis", ¶a ¶aj a tatamaan a wawapaŇčaŇčan ńßan r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô, u sabama ni r~…ĺan-taw-bu ¶a ¶aj a tatamaan a wawa paŇčaŇčan ńßan a ¶a tu ¶i r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô. ( ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs r~…ĺir~…ĺburn…ô r~…ĺ…ôwis), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ônŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tang-ma-s.cye-bu-sun "kamu nu Ing, Thomas Jefferson, 1743 a mihca 4 a bulad 13 a demiad-1826 a mihca 7 a bulad 4 a demiad"saka tulu a Cong-tung nu Amilika "1801 a muhcaan -1809 a mihcaan". namahiza u "teked nu Amilika musakamu" angangan saayaway nu misulit a tademaw, atu Amilaka palekal tu kanatal u sakaliliday. Kalacungtungan u satabakiay a kawaw pasu ci Lu-i-s-an-na a picakay tu lala' "1803 a mihcaan", 1807 a mihcaan la'cus miculu'a hulican, atu aci Lu-i-s atu Ke-la-ke a piazih "1804- 1806 a mihcaan" uzip mala migingkiway tu cen-ce, ci Cye-bu-sun mitelung tu ku-tyen paydang ku nizateng atu kapulung a nizateng, nipahecekan "Wi-ci-ni-ya kiwkay paydang a hulic" "Virginia Statute for Religious Freedom, 1779,1786 ), uyni a hulic anuayaw mala nu Amilika a huluc tu sakacaca nisumadan nisabaluhayay angangan a nisulitan, Cye-bu-sun-min-cu, "Jeffersonian democracy" namahini a singangan ciniza. 1792 a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun patizeng a mikelid tu min-cu-kung-he-tang "ayzaay nu ayaway a min-cin-tang". "(Virginia Statute for Religious Freedom, 1779, 1786) . Cye-bu-sun na u saka tusa nu Wi-ci-niya-cow a cow-cang "1779 a mihcaan-1781 a mihcaan", saayaway nu Amilika a kow-u-cin "1789 a mihcaan-1793 a mihcaan", atu saka tusa nu Amilika a bu-Cong-tong "1797 a mihcaan-1801 a mihcaan. 1800 a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun pakazemec tu malaliday nu Amilika nu sakatulu a Cong-tong ci Ya-tang-s, namahiza nikilidan niza a cen-tang mikuwan tu Amilika katukuh sepat tu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan, katukuh cen-tanng niza tu 1824 a mihcaan katukuh i kaliwasakan. . Caay ku cen-ce dada; ku kawaw, ci Cyee-bu-sun mahiza sa u migingkiw tu kaluk, migingkiw tu palumaan, migingkiw tu sapatizeng, migingkiwa tu lalekalan tu cudad, migingkiw tu kasumamadan a tuud, migingkiw tu saasipan, migingkiw tu mi-ma, migingkiw tu sapidetek atu kasumamadan nu mauzipayay sye-ke a mitesekay, u mitesekay nu misulitay, mitesekay a binkusi atu adidic'ay a ti-cin, uyza aca nu Wi-ni-ci-ya talakaway cacudadan nu patizengay a tademaw. hini sa ku katuuday ciniza hatini mala Cong-tongay nu Amilika, u sitenengay. i 1962 a mihcaan cacay a pipalabangan 49 kunitakus tu tademaw nu sikawlahay tu Now-pey-al palabangan tu sandeb. Ye-han. Kan-nay-ti musuayay tu haminay nu tumunaw syaka nu sitinengay a tademaw musakamu, "pitapal aku ayza a sandebay kalacapu nu Pay-kung sakatuuday a tenengay atu sitinengay a tademawan-hakay miliyas tawyaay a mihcaan ci Cye-bu-sun tataytay itini mukan hawsa caay pisausi."I 2005 a mihcaan Amilika i wangle palekal tu pisingkiw a kawaw "u siicelangay amilika" ci Cye-bu-sun masingkiw tu saiicelangay nu Amilika tu 12 a tademaw. duduc ku katahkal hawsa u zu-lye-li ku hahizaen, 1743 a mihca 4 a bulad 2 a demiad Cye-bu-sun lecuh i Wi-ci-ni-ya a A-al-pow-ma-al cacay kitizaan cacay aenengan pangangan han Sa-te-wi-al a kalukan, nika kilul i mauzipay hawsa sumad au Ke-li-kaw-li-li, u pilecuhan ni Cye-bu-sun i 4 a bulad 13 a dimiad. ci Cye-bu-sun leccuh i kakitaan cumelakay ku luma', 10 ku calkakaan u sakatulu ciniza "tatusa ku mahaludutay" ngangan nu wama ci Pi-te. Cye-bu-sun, u palumaan pahabayay mikawa aca tu miditekay, wina ci Cen.lan-taw-bu "Jane Randolph", ci Ay-sya-mu.lan-taw-bu "Isham Randolph" atu ci Cen.low-cye-s "Jane Rogers" tataynaan a wawa, Pi-te. Cye-bu-sun "Peter Jefferson" u lalumaan. Ay-sye-mu ju iIng-kow-lin-tun-cen-tung-sa a Sa-te-wi-al tinsikiw a kiwkay "Shadwell Parish church" a malaacawa. Ci Tang-ma-s. Cye-bu-sun a babalaki u matenesay mueneng a Wi-ci-ni-ya nu mabulawan a luma'. (Isham Randolph)ŤąáÁŹć¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Jane Rogers)šĻčŚ•≥,ŚĹľŚĺó¬∑ŚāĎŚľóťĀú(Peter Jefferson) (Shadwell Parish church)ÁĶźÁöĄŚ©ö.śĻĮÁĎ™śĖĮ¬∑ . ci Pi-te.Cye-bu-sun matuduh ku luma' zikuz, hamin nu luma' mabulal tayza I Ye-ci-lin "Edge Hill". uyni a buyu i 17 lasubu a mihcaan hawsa miedap ci Ye-han.Li-pow-ney palahad tu cen-ce a kawaw a Ing-kow labu malalais saayaway a kalalais a singangan, .Cye-bu-sun a sabana Lu-si "Lucy" mikadabu ci Ca-al-s.Li-pow-ney.Lu-i-s "Charles Lilburne Lewis", cacay a tatamaan a wawapangangan han Li-pow-ney, u sabama ni Lan-taw-bu cacay a tatamaan a wawa pangangan han aca tu ci Li-pow-ney. (Charles Lilburne Lewis), . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinenngan

"(*irginia statut…ô for *…ôr~…ĺigious fr…ô…ôdom, ****, ****) . ¶j…ô-bu-sun na u saka tusa nu wi- ¶i-nija- ¶ow a ¶ow- ¶aŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan", saajawaj nu amir~…ĺika a kow-u- ¶in "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan", atu saka tusa nu amir~…ĺika a bu- ¶oŇč-toŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun pakaz…ôm…ô ¶ tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu amir~…ĺika nu ¶oŇč-toŇčaj nu amir~…ĺika, u sit…ôn…ôŇčaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a pipar~…ĺabaŇčan ** kunitakus tu tad…ômaw nu sikawr~…ĺańßaj tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ par~…ĺabaŇčan tu sand…ôb. j…ô-ńßan. kan-naj-ti musuajaj tu ńßaminaj nu tumunaw sjaka nu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw musakamu, "pitapar~…ĺ aku ajza a sand…ôbaj kar~…ĺa ¶apu nu paj-kuŇč sakatuudaj a t…ôn…ôŇčaj atu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômawan-ńßakaj mir~…ĺijas tawjaaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun tatajtaj itini mukan ńßawsa ¶aaj pisausi."i **** a mińß ¶aan amir~…ĺika i waŇčr~…ĺ…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu pisiŇčkiw a kawaw "u sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj amir~…ĺika" ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-sun masiŇčkiw tu saii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu amir~…ĺika tu ** a tad…ômaw. dudu ¶ ku katańßkar~…ĺ ńßawsa u zu-r~…ĺj…ô-r~…ĺi ku ńßańßiza…ôn, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ¶j…ô-bu-sun (isńßam *andor~…ĺpńß)******(*an…ô *og…ôrs)**,******(p…ôt…ôr *…ôff…ôrson) (sńßadw…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ parisńß ¶ńßur ¶ńß)***.**** . ¶i pi-t…ô. ¶j…ô-bu-sun matuduńß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, ńßamin nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mabur~…ĺar~…ĺ tajza i j…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺin "…ôdg…ô ńßir~…ĺr~…ĺ". ujni a buju i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa mi…ôdap ¶i j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô par~…ĺańßad tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawaw a iŇč-kow r~…ĺabu mar~…ĺar~…ĺais saajawaj a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais a siŇčaŇčan, . ¶j…ô-bu-sun a sabana r~…ĺu-si "r~…ĺu ¶j" mikadabu ¶i ¶a-ar~…ĺ-s.r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô.r~…ĺu-i-s " ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs r~…ĺir~…ĺburn…ô r~…ĺ…ôwis", ¶a ¶aj a tatamaan a wawapaŇčaŇčan ńßan r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô, u sabama ni r~…ĺan-taw-bu ¶a ¶aj a tatamaan a wawa paŇčaŇčan ńßan a ¶a tu ¶i r~…ĺi-pow-n…ô. ( ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs r~…ĺir~…ĺburn…ô r~…ĺ…ôwis), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ônŇčan
